settings.heading: Troubleshoot the clearest symptom first
settings.copy: Start with the symptom you are seeing, then take the clearest recovery action without guessing between pages.
settings.support_note: Start with the visible symptom, then take the clearest next action instead of bouncing between support pages.

settings.heading: Troubleshooting by symptom and product behavior
settings.copy: Review recurring issues, likely causes, and the clearest support action without losing the rest of the ownership flow.

settings.heading: Move into compatibility, downloads, or direct help
settings.copy: If troubleshooting does not solve it, move naturally into compatibility, downloads, manuals, or direct support.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Open drivers and utilities when the issue points to software or tools.

settings.title: Compatibility
settings.copy: Check compatibility again when the issue may be caused by device, platform, or workflow mismatch.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Contact support when guided troubleshooting still leaves one question open.

settings.heading: Still need help beyond guided troubleshooting?
settings.copy: Open contact or warranty guidance once self-service is exhausted and the issue still needs direct review.
